pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — 8 consecutive quiet polls. No substantive dome site changes. V51.0 parameters unchanged. Automated commits only (monitor.py + pull_data.py). Canary traps not triggered.
pipeline_status.analyst: Last run 2026-04-06T22:30:00Z. Mode 2 — EXP-008 completed (Section 3.2 + 6.2 eclipse rewrite, ~420+200 → ~1350+350 words). EXP-009 also complete (Section 3.1 + 4.6.x + 5.15). 5 expansions remaining (EXP-010 through EXP-013, plus EXP-007 manual).
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: Cycle 2, Phase 1: 6/99 items reviewed (WIN-001 through WIN-005 complete, WIN-006 in progress per tracker). WIN-005 Cycle 2 found 2 CRITICAL unfixed issues from Cycle 1: CHAOS-7 DOI error (ISS-490) and monitoring tag error (ISS-491). Both patched this run.
pipeline_status.integrity: WARN — 1 broken external link (INTERMAGNET download page, 404, site redesigned). All other checks PASS: build reproducible (0 diff lines), 2017 tests pass, all internal anchors valid, tab chain valid, WIN consistency 67/67, data-prose counts match.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: None detected. 8 consecutive quiet polls. All parameters identical to baseline: V51.0, 67 WINs, 95.2% accuracy, same core parameters. No manual commits. WIN-062 Tesla announcement still dated 2026-04-04 (unchanged).
internal_inconsistencies_unchanged: Eclipse nT: Site says -17 to -21 nT; monitor.py uses -29.1 nT (40% gap)

expansions_integrated.key_changes: Section 3.2 expanded from ~420 to ~1350 words. Five factual errors corrected (prediction range, 1.672 KAPPA conflation, GUA 2016 baseline, '0.0 nT exactly' quote, Chapman attribution). E-PRED A/B/C/D all analyzed — E-PRED-B acknowledged as genuine non-trivial prediction; others shown non-discriminating or confirming standard model. Dual-baseline hedging structure quantified (combined -5 to -26 nT covers nearly all plausible Chapman range). W004 provenance exposed (failed weekly test → relabeled baseline). Public pre-commitment statement added.

expansions_integrated.target: Section 3.1 (5 inline fixes) + Sections 4.6.1/4.6.2/4.6.3 (full replacements) + Section 5.15 (Schumann direction fix)
expansions_integrated.key_changes: Section 3.1 fixes: Polaris contradiction in bottom line corrected; λg fitting process explained; Domain #2 Tesla now cross-references WIN-001 patent finding; OPEN-001 concession added; Domain #5 EM-Gravity precision improved. Sections 4.6.1/2/3 tripled in size: specific WIN examples added, 95.2% as static HTML directly evidenced, 'none' WINs stratified into theological vs merely-absent-script, prospective WIN classification now distinguishes registered prospective from post-hoc adopted. Section 5.15 Schumann direction corrected: 7.83 Hz is INPUT (used to derive H₀=c/4f), not output — using actual exponential H(r) yields ~22 Hz.

win005_cycle2_issues.description: CHAOS-7 DOI error — 10.1186/s40623-020-01163-9 links to wrong paper. Correct: 10.1186/s40623-020-01252-9 (Olsen et al. 2020). Unfixed from Cycle 1.
WIN-005 monitoring tag 'live_fetch' → should be 'hardcoded'. Dome hardcodes SAA thresholds in inject_ai_layer.py, does NOT dynamically fetch CHAOS-7. Unfixed from Cycle 1.
